result.response: All 4 blocking issues from code review were fixed: (1) Removed PII from log messages, (2) Wrapped import in Room transaction, (3) Export throws on null outputStream, (4) Added LaunchedEffect to redirect to sign-in on first launch. Build verified successful after fixes.
